tokenStorage.native: expo-secure-store (keys: access_token, refresh_token, auth_user) with AsyncStorage one-shot migration fallback
tokenStorage.note: EXPO_PUBLIC_JWT_STORAGE_KEY / EXPO_PUBLIC_REFRESH_TOKEN_KEY / EXPO_PUBLIC_USER_DATA_KEY env vars are defined but unused (hardcoded in utils/authStorage.ts).

authHeaderPattern.attachment: automatic on every request via apiClient.merge of defaultHeaders into RequestInit.headers
authHeaderPattern.unsetOnLogout: delete this.defaultHeaders['Authorization'] when token is null
authHeaderPattern.refreshFlow: 401 -> apiClient.handleTokenRefresh() -> AuthContext.tryRefreshToken() -> authService.refreshToken(refreshToken) POST /user/auth/refresh-token -> saves new tokens via authStorage.saveAuthToken + saveRefreshToken -> updates apiClient.authToken + defaultHeaders.Authorization -> retries original request once
authHeaderPattern.refreshFailureFlow: on 401/403/invalid/expired: clearAuthData + dispatch AUTH_LOGOUT + redirect to /sign-in

migrationItems: Set EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL to gateway URL (currently http://localhost:5001/api)
Add EXPO_PUBLIC_AUTH_SERVICE_URL pointing to auth-service (e.g. https://rez-auth-service.onrender.com)
Add EXPO_PUBLIC_INTERNAL_SERVICE_TOKEN shared secret (X-Internal-Token header on auth-service calls)
Remap auth endpoints: /user/auth/* -> {RABTUL_AUTH_SERVICE_URL}/api/auth/*
Rename /user/auth/complete-onboarding -> /api/auth/onboarding
Switch profile update from PUT /user/auth/profile to PATCH /api/auth/profile
Add X-Internal-Token + X-Request-Origin headers on auth-service calls (RABTUL pattern)
Add CSRF nonce (X-CSRF-Token) on web auth requests, cached 5 min
Add Idempotency-Key on POST /api/auth/logout
Disable retry on OTP send (maxRetries: 0) - duplicate SMS charge risk
Disable retry on OTP verify (maxRetries: 0) - wrong-OTP must fail immediately
Disable retry on logout (maxRetries: 0) - double-invalidation risk
Validate tokens.expiresIn is positive in authApi.validateAuthResponse
Refactor services/surveysApi.ts, services/eventsApi.ts, services/eventAnalytics.ts to use apiClient (currently use raw fetch and miss the auth header)
Migrate web token storage from localStorage to httpOnly cookies (apiClient fetch must set credentials: "include")
Keep native SecureStore as primary; remove AsyncStorage token fallback (one-shot migration can stay)
Delete unused config/api.ts axios wrapper + API_ENDPOINTS map
Update components/homepage/DealsThatSaveMoney.tsx impression/click tracking to use apiClient
Update components/subscription/StripePaymentModal.tsx to use apiClient
Update services/imageUploadService.ts to use apiClient.uploadFile
Update app/orders/[id].tsx billing invoice download to use apiClient
Decide whether /auth/change-password and /auth/account (legacy paths) should be migrated to auth-service
Update EXPO_PUBLIC_PROD_API_URL placeholder to the real production gateway URL
Remove or document dead env vars: EXPO_PUBLIC_JWT_STORAGE_KEY, EXPO_PUBLIC_REFRESH_TOKEN_KEY, EXPO_PUBLIC_USER_DATA_KEY (hardcoded in utils/authStorage.ts)
Update test scripts that hardcode http://localhost:5001 to point at the gateway dev port
Update Jest integration tests to mock the new auth-service URL pattern
